title: equisetum × mackayi
intro: Equisetum × mackayi, also known as Mackay's horsetail, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is native to New Zealand. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antifungal activities, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including urinary tract problems, kidney stones, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as improved kidney function and reduced inflammation. Equisetum × mackayi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
